query:
SELECT 
  ticker,
  entryPrice,
  stopLoss,
  exitPrice,
  exitReason,
  ROUND((stopLoss - entryPrice) / entryPrice * 100, 3) AS sl_pct,
  ROUND((exitPrice - entryPrice) / entryPrice * 100, 3) AS pnl_pct,
  executionSlippage,
  openedAt,
  closedAt
FROM paperTrades
WHERE closedAt IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ABS((stopLoss - entryPrice) / entryPrice) ASC
LIMIT 30;
